title: To Glide
description: A simple way to glide across the sky
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f999cdec19eed742f0aea72366643bd0988509d9.png)

Take to the skies—no wings required.

**To Glide** adds a simple but immersive gliding system to Minecraft, letting you slow your fall and travel through the air using handheld gliders. Whether you're exploring mountains, escaping danger, or just enjoying the view, gliding gives you a new way to move through the world.

---

## Features

* **Handheld Gliders**
  Activate a glider mid-air to reduce fall speed and glide forward.

* **Smooth Aerial Movement**
  Control your descent and momentum for a natural, responsive flying experience.

* **Toggle System**
  Turn gliding on and off instantly while in the air.

* **Dyeable Gliders**
  Customize your glider’s appearance with any color.

* **Third-Person Animations**
  Dynamic arm positioning and item alignment while gliding for better immersion.

* **No Elytra Required**
  Glide early-game without needing rare endgame items.

---

## How It Works

1. Hold a glider in your main hand
2. Jump or fall from a height
3. Right-click mid-air to activate gliding
4. Control your descent and direction
5. Right-click again to deactivate

You must be slightly above the ground to start gliding.

---

## Mechanics

* Gradual fall speed reduction
* Forward momentum scaling
* Automatic deactivation when:

  * touching the ground
  * entering water
  * using Elytra

---

## Customization

* Fully dyeable like leather armor
* Works with resource packs
* Designed to visually fit both classic and slim player models

---
